lead.headline: Day2Health technical rehearsal sets tone for morning
lead.deck: With the Republic working session and creative meeting following at 10 and 11:15, the 9:30 run-through is your foundation—any technical issues caught now won't derail the day's momentum. This is your window to ensure everything holds up before back-to-back strategic work.
